dict.string: DX Agents needs camera access for photo capture automation.
DX Agents needs microphone access for voice commands and audio recording.
DX Agents needs speech recognition for voice transcription.
DX Agents needs Automation permission to control other applications via AppleScript.
DX Agents needs Screen Recording to see what is on screen so the agent can act on the current context.
DX Agents needs Input Monitoring to receive global hotkeys and observe user activity outside its own windows.
